# Reflectance data

<!-- Note to authors: Do not edit the index.md directly, edit 
     header.txt and use ./gencams.py. See the README. -->

This directory  contains  reflectance target files. These contain  reflectance
spectra  for the  different  patches  in the  target,  with the PCT data being
recorded for a range of different stereo reflectance angles with the incidence
angle being fixed at roughly the position of the PCT on the rover.

Each file is a PCOT archive (`.parc`) file which should be placed
in the cameras directory. This must be specified in the `.pcot.ini` file
in the locations section:

```ini
[Locations]
reflectances = /home/white/PCOT/reflectances
```
If not specified, no data will be loaded! The `.pcot.ini` can be
found in the user's home directory.

## Reflectance files

!!! danger
    At this stage of development the data may be inaccurate!
